item.title: Running water, 5th April
item.description:
This water has been visible for the last two weeks. Not only is this a slip hazard but there is now algae growing on the path. Looks to be coming from a pipe in the wall from the house.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Safety Concern – Days Lane DA15 8JL, 5th April
item.description:
Subject: Road Safety Concern – Days Lane (DA15) I would like to formally report a road safety concern on Days Lane, DA15 - especially from the Halfway road turn in. The road is experiencing frequent speeding and a high volume of traffic, despite being a relatively narrow residential street. Vehicles regularly travel at unsafe speeds, and the situation is made worse by buses using the road. When buses pass through, there is often insufficient space for opposing traffic, creating conflict points and forcing vehicles onto the edges of the carriageway. This has resulted in repeated near misses and presents a clear safety risk to pedestrians, cyclists, and residents, particularly given the limited road width and visibility. I would like to request that the council carry out: - A traffic volume survey - A speed survey - A full road safety assessment Based on the findings, I ask that appropriate measures are considered, such as traffic calming (e.g. speed cushions or a 20mph zone) or traffic management changes to reduce through traffic. This road currently appears unsuitable for the level and type of traffic it is carrying, particularly with buses and general traffic competing for limited space. I would appreciate confirmation that this issue will be investigated.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags left on pavement, 5th April

item.title: Lots of broken glass on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
